event_detail_pages.source_title: What is the Golden Pass Event?
event_detail_pages.page_title: What is the Golden Pass Event? – Coin Master
relevant_text_blocks: What is the Golden Pass Event?
Imagine an event that's just as glitzy as you are, full of chances to win exciting prizes. 🤩 Here's the glittery scoop:
✨ The Paths: Free, Golden, and Epic
Three paths await you, each with its own sparkly set of rewards:
Free: These rewards are available to you for participating in the event.

Golden Pass: This premium path doubles or even triples the rewards for your missions. Simply purchase the Golden Pass and bask in the premium rewards - they'll be available for you to earn until the event ends. 🌟🌟🌟

Epic Pass: In some Golden Pass events, you might also see an extra Epic Pass path. This optional premium lane adds a third row of rewards on top of your Free and Golden Pass rewards. When you buy the Epic Pass, any milestones you've already completed become claimable on this lane as well, and your future progress will keep filling all unlocked paths until the event ends. 🚀
🪄 Piggy Pointer: Look out for special discounts when you purchase the Golden Pass and Epic Pass together. You can also buy each pass separately.
📅 Daily Missions and Rewards
Each day is a new adventure with a fresh set of daily missions. Complete these missions to earn gold bars that help you progress along your chosen path.
Keep an eye on the progress bar at the top of the paths to see how many bars you'll need to reach the next reward level. 👀
And here's the grandest part: If you complete all the missions with the Golden Pass, you'll bag the fabulous grand prize! 🏆
🔒 The 4th Locked Mission
Occasionally, you might encounter a mission that's locked. You can still progress in the mission, but it'll only unlock if you activate the Golden Pass or the Epic Pass.
💛 Unleash the Fun with Multiple Golden Pass Events: More Missions, More Rewards

Every now and then, you might spot multiple Golden Pass events all happening at the same time. That's like hitting the jackpot - more ways to snag some seriously sweet rewards! Just keep in mind that you'll need to activate each Golden Pass separately to unlock the Golden lanes. 🎫
🎁 Claiming Your Rewards

Did you forget to collect your rewards before the event ended? We've got you covered. All unclaimed rewards will be automatically sent to your inventory, so you can still revel in your hard-earned winnings. 🙌

event_detail_pages.source_title: How can I subscribe to Coin Master email rewards and updates?
event_detail_pages.page_title: How can I subscribe to Coin Master email rewards and updates? – Coin Master
event_detail_pages.meta_description: Inbox rewards, news, and tips? Yep, you can get all that straight from us with Coin Master emails. ✉️🐷Jump to: Why subscribe to Coin...
relevant_text_blocks: How can I subscribe to Coin Master email rewards and updates?
Inbox rewards, news, and tips? Yep, you can get all that straight from us with Coin Master emails. ✉️🐷
Why subscribe to Coin Master emails?
🎁 Daily rewards and goodies sent straight to your inbox
⏰ Timely updates on events, features, and limited-time surprises
🧭 A reliable way to catch special rewards without constantly checking the game
And yes, you can unsubscribe from these emails at any time (by clicking on 'Unsubscribe' at the bottom)… but with all the rewards and tips packed inside, why would you want to? 😉
How to subscribe to Coin Master emails
Follow these quick steps to subscribe for email rewards and updates:
Under Topic, select “Subscribe for Email Rewards and Updates” .
That’s it! Once it’s processed, you’ll start receiving Coin Master email rewards and updates in your inbox. 🎉
Make sure you never miss a Coin Master email
Every now and then, delete old emails or large attachments so there’s always room for new rewards.
Mark it as “Not spam” and add us to your contacts so future rewards go straight to your main inbox.
If you change emails in the future, just subscribe again using your new address so we can keep sending you rewards.
By doing these quick checks in advance, you’ll be all set to receive Coin Master rewards, news, and surprises smoothly in your inbox. 🥳
Spin in game, win in inbox. Subscribing to emails keeps your Coin Master rewards close by. ✨
34612570635410|How can I subscribe to Coin Master email rewards and updates?|/hc/en-us/articles/34612570635410-How-can-I-subscribe-to-Coin-Master-email-rewards-and-updates

event_detail_pages.source_title: How can I play Viking Quest?
event_detail_pages.page_title: How can I play Viking Quest? – Coin Master
event_detail_pages.meta_description: Ready to spin for some serious rewards? Viking Quest is here to challenge even the most seasoned Coin Masters! This epic mini-game lets...
relevant_text_blocks: How can I play Viking Quest?

Ready to spin for some serious rewards? Viking Quest is here to challenge even the most seasoned Coin Masters! This epic mini-game lets you use your Coins for a chance to win astronomical rewards and build up your village. ⚔
To begin your Viking Quest adventure, tap the Viking Quest badge on the main screen. You’ll be taken to your mission.
🗺️ Multi-Mission Viking Quest

When it's live, this Viking Quest experience includes different rounds, with each one presenting a new challenge and its own unique art. The further you go, the more challenging the adventure becomes. You'll have more chances to play, and the further you get, the bigger and better the rewards you can win, like rare Gold Cards! 🎁
To start playing, click on the Viking Quest badge from the main screen. Here, you'll be able to see the Quests waiting for you. Just click on "QUEST NOW!" to begin playing.
Once you've entered the event tap the gift icon to open your Missions Map. The map shows your progress and all the amazing rewards you can earn for your current stage .
🧭 Tips for Your Voyage
Any Coins you win from the Viking Spinner are Raid Protected for three minutes after each Spin. This gives you time to sit back and enjoy your spoils!
Look for other events that offer free Spins, Coins, and other bonuses. Participating in these can help you build up the resources you need to get further in Viking Quest.
Now go forth and conquer! Your epic rewards await. 🚀💪
29651331693970|How can I play Viking Quest?|/hc/en-us/articles/29651331693970-How-can-I-play-Viking-Quest
